info.title: Pet Hotel & Grooming System API
info.description:
Contract-first OpenAPI for the Pet Hotel & Grooming System.

**S1 status:** endpoints are stubs (HTTP 501) with complete request/response schemas — this document is the single source of truth for backend + frontend. Business logic, state machines and real payment/notification land in S2+.

Authoritative data model: `diagrams/puml/class_diagram_plantuml.puml`. Internal modules (payment, notification, audit) are not exposed as endpoints.

schema.title: Response List Accounts Api V1 Auth Accounts Get
Response List Roles Api V1 Auth Roles Get
Response List Permissions Api V1 Auth Permissions Get

post.summary: Assign a role to an account (FR-01.2)

delete.summary: Revoke a role from an account (FR-01.2)

schema.title: Response List Pets Api V1 Pets Get
Response List Medical Records Api V1 Pets  Pet Id  Medical Records Get
Response List Vaccinations Api V1 Pets  Pet Id  Vaccinations Get

post.summary: Mark danger level — Staff/Groomer: Low/Medium, Admin: High (FR-02.7)

get.summary: List bookable service items — Standard/Deluxe room, Basic/Full grooming (FR-03.1/03.7)

schema.title: Response List Services Api V1 Bookings Services Get

get.summary: Check availability for a service + window (FR-03.2/06.2)

schema.title: Response List Pending Review Api V1 Bookings Pending Review Get

409.description: Rejected — pet danger level is High (FR-02.8)

schema.title: Response List Bookings Api V1 Bookings Get

get.summary: Get booking detail incl. items + pets (FR-03.4/04.4)

post.summary: Approve/Reject a PendingReview booking — staff (FR-02.8, seq5)

schema.title: Response List Kennels Api V1 Checkin Kennels Get

post.summary: Mark a cleaned kennel Available — manual (FR-06.4)
Perform check-in: verify booking + chip + vaccine, assign kennel (FR-04.1, seq2)
Record vaccine at counter + auto-verify expiry (FR-02.5/06.1, seq2)
Check out: pet leaves → kennel Cleaning (FR-06.4)
Front-desk trigger emergency for a booked pet — Booking-layer (FR-06.3, SDD §8)

get.summary: List work orders (groomer queue / by booking)

schema.title: Response List Work Orders Api V1 Grooming Work Orders Get

post.summary: Start a work order: Pending → PreCheck (seq3)

schema.title: Response List Photos Api V1 Grooming Work Orders  Work Order Id  Photos Get

post.summary: Complete a work order: Grooming → Completed (seq3)
Trigger emergency: any stage → Aborted (FR-06.3, seq3)
Cancel a booking + apply 24h refund rule (FR-03.3/05.4, seq4)

AvailabilityOut.title: AvailabilityOut
AvailabilityOut.description: FR-03.2 / FR-06.2 — only currently-available slots are returned.

BookingCreateIn.title: BookingCreateIn
BookingCreateIn.description:
FR-03.1 — choose pet(s), service(s) and a time window. Danger gating
(FR-02.8) decides the resulting status (PendingDeposit / PendingReview) or a
409 rejection when the pet's danger level is High.

BookingVerifyOut.title: BookingVerifyOut
BookingVerifyOut.description: FR-04.1 — front-desk verifies booking status before check-in.

CancelBookingIn.title: CancelBookingIn
CancelBookingIn.description: NFR-05 — every cancellation records a reason (retained ≥180 days).

CheckInRequestIn.title: CheckInRequestIn
CheckInRequestIn.description: seq2 — scan chip / enter booking id.

CheckInResultOut.title: CheckInResultOut
CheckInResultOut.description:
result=Success → kennelNumber for lodging; result=Blocked → reason
(e.g. VaccineExpired, FR-06.1).

DangerLevelMarkIn.title: DangerLevelMarkIn
DangerLevelMarkIn.description: FR-02.7 — Staff/Groomer: Low/Medium; Admin: High. Note required.

description.title: Description
examples: 住宿寵物突發嘔吐，已聯絡飼主

EmergencyAtCounterIn.title: EmergencyAtCounterIn

EmergencyEventOut.title: EmergencyEventOut
EmergencyEventOut.description:
Booking-layer event (SDD §8). workOrderId is set only for grooming-stage
emergencies; NULL for front-desk/lodging ones.

detail.title: Detail
examples: Booking rejected: pet danger level is High

ErrorOut.title: ErrorOut
ErrorOut.description: Shape of error responses (e.g. danger-High rejection, unavailable slot).

GroomingStage.title: GroomingStage
GroomingStage.description:
The 4 advanceable stages (FR-04.5) — a subset of WorkStatus used as the
request body for stage updates.

KennelOut.title: KennelOut
KennelOut.description: FR-03.6 — also surfaces which pet currently occupies the kennel.

KennelUpdateIn.title: KennelUpdateIn
KennelUpdateIn.description: FR-06.4 — staff updates kennel status (e.g. Cleaning → Available).

MedicalRecordCreateIn.title: MedicalRecordCreateIn
MedicalRecordCreateIn.description: FR-02.2 — append only; never modified/deleted afterwards.

Money.title: Money
Money.description:
SDD §3.5: monetary value as decimal + currency. Single-currency system
(ECPay / Taiwan) so currency defaults to TWD.

PetCreateIn.title: PetCreateIn
PetCreateIn.description: FR-02.1 / 02.6 — basic profile + optional behaviour note.

ProfileUpdateIn.title: ProfileUpdateIn
ProfileUpdateIn.description: FR-01.4 — users may edit their own name + phone.

reason.title: Reason
examples: 取消時間距開始 > 24 小時，全額退還訂金

RefundOut.title: RefundOut
RefundOut.description: FR-05.4 — >24h before start: full deposit refund; ≤24h or no-show: none.

StaffCreateIn.title: StaffCreateIn
StaffCreateIn.description: FR-01.2 — admin creates a staff account with a role.

VaccinationCreateIn.title: VaccinationCreateIn
VaccinationCreateIn.description: FR-02.3 — owner pre-enters vaccine + expiry (optional data).

VaccineRecordAtCounterIn.title: VaccineRecordAtCounterIn
VaccineRecordAtCounterIn.description:
FR-02.5 — staff records the vaccine at check-in; system auto-verifies
expiry (FR-06.1).

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Gateway service — registration, login, password reset, self-profile (FR-01.1/01.4) + admin RBAC: roles, permissions, staff creation, account ban, abnormal-cancellation report (FR-01.2/01.3).

tags.name: Pets & Health
tags.description: Owner-facing resource — pet profiles, append-only medical records, vaccinations + proof upload, danger-level marking & unblock (FR-02.*).

tags.name: Booking
tags.description: Gateway service — create lodging/grooming bookings with danger gating, availability, list/history, deposit & final payment, staff review (FR-03.*, FR-05.3, FR-02.8).

tags.name: CheckIn
tags.description: Gateway service — front-desk check-in (booking+chip+vaccine), counter vaccine entry, check-out, kennel management (FR-04.1, FR-02.5, FR-06.1, FR-03.6/06.4).

tags.name: Grooming
tags.description: Gateway service — work-order lifecycle, 4-stage advance, photo upload, completion, emergency trigger (FR-04.2/04.4/04.5, FR-06.3).

tags.name: Cancellation
tags.description: Gateway service — cancel a booking and apply the 24h refund rule (FR-03.3, FR-05.4).
